title.en: Pumpkin cultivation — dry + intermediate zones, Yala
title.si: වට්ටක්කා වගාව — වියළි හා අතරමැදි කලාප, යල

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for pumpkin (Cucurbita maxima) up to 500 m elevation in dry and intermediate zones. Grown as Yala crop. Spacing varies by variety: Local strain 3 × 3 m, A.N.K. 2.5 × 2.5 m, Butternut 50 × 100 cm. Soil pH 5.5–7.5. Seed rate 1 kg/ha. Harvest 20–60 days after flowering depending on variety. Yield 15–20 t/ha.
summary.si: වියළි හා අතරමැදි කලාපවල 500 m දක්වා උන්නතාංශයේ වට්ටක්කා (Cucurbita maxima) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. යල කන්නයේ වගාකරයි. පරතරය ප්‍රභේදය අනුව: දේශීය 3 × 3 m, A.N.K. 2.5 × 2.5 m, Butternut 50 × 100 cm. පස් pH 5.5-7.5. බීජ මාත්‍රාව 1 kg/හෙ. ප්‍රභේදය අනුව පිපීමෙන් දින 20-60 කින් අස්වනු. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 15-20/හෙ.

body.en: Well-drained soil at pH 5.5–7.5 up to 500 m elevation. Prepare planting pits to the variety-specific spacing: Local strain 3 × 3 m, A.N.K. 2.5 × 2.5 m, Butternut 50 × 100 cm.
Direct seed at the variety-specific spacing. Seed rate 1 kg/ha.

name.en: Pumpkin seed (Pathma / A.N.K. / Butternut / Local Strain)

body.en: Butternut 20 days after flowering; A.N.K. 40 days after flowering; local varieties 60 days after flowering. Yield 15–20 t/ha.

notes.en: Powdery mildew and downy mildew. Apply recommended fungicides at first lesions per DOA 2019 pesticide recommendation.
Collar rot / root rot and gummy stem blight. Avoid waterlogging; fungicide soil drench at first symptoms.
Leaf curl virus / papaya ring spot virus / cucumber mosaic virus / zucchini yellow mosaic virus — vectored by whiteflies and aphids. Control vectors early; remove infected plants.
Bacterial wilt (Erwinia tracheiphila) — no chemical control. Use resistant varieties, rotate with non-cucurbits, control cucumber beetles.
